queries.question: Distinct ids of patients with any appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.patient_id FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id

queries.question: Distinct ids of patients with a 'completed' appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.patient_id FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.status = 'completed'

queries.question: Distinct ids of patients with any appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.patient_id FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id

queries.question: Distinct ids of patients with a 'cancelled' appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.patient_id FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.status = 'cancelled'

queries.question: Distinct patient ids with any appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM appointments

queries.question: Distinct patient ids seen by a cardiology doctor.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id WHERE d.specialty = 'cardiology'

queries.question: Distinct patient ids with a completed cardiology appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id WHERE d.specialty = 'cardiology' AND a.status = 'completed'

queries.question: Distinct customer ids that placed any order.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders

queries.question: Distinct ids of gold customers that placed an order.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.loyalty_level = 'gold'

queries.question: Distinct ids of gold customers with a delivered order.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.loyalty_level = 'gold' AND o.order_status = 'delivered'

queries.question: Distinct ids of gold customers with a delivered order shipped to Portland.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.loyalty_level = 'gold' AND o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.shipping_city = 'Portland'

queries.question: Distinct player ids with a 2010 batting record.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2010

queries.question: Distinct player ids who batted for a 2010 World Series-winning team.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT b.playerID FROM Batting b JOIN Teams t ON b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.yearID = t.yearID WHERE b.yearID = 2010 AND t.WSWin = 'Y'

queries.question: Distinct customer ids with any sales order.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID FROM SalesOrderHeader

queries.question: Distinct customer ids that ordered in the Canada territory.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT h.CustomerID FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID WHERE t.Name = 'Canada'

queries.question: Distinct Canada customer ids with an order above 50000.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT h.CustomerID FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID WHERE t.Name = 'Canada' AND h.TotalDue > 50000
